## Description

Please include a summary of the mobile app change and user impact.

---

## Type of change

Please check the relevant option:

- [ ] Bug fix (fixes an existing issue)
- [ ] New feature (adds new functionality)
- [ ] UI / UX update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)

---

## What was changed?

- ...

---

## Screenshots / Video

> Required if there are UI changes

---

## How Has This Been Tested? (Manual)

Please describe how reviewers can verify this change.

1. Run app locally
2. Test on:
   - [ ] Android
   - [ ] iOS
3. Verify:
   - [ ] Case 1
   - [ ] Case 2

---

## Risk Level

- [ ] Low – safe change
- [ ] Medium – affects navigation / state
- [ ] High – crash / data loss risk

---

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title contains `[BH-KEY]`
- [ ] Commit messages follow convention
- [ ] Jira ticket is linked
- [ ] App does not crash
- [ ] UI matches design
- [ ] Manual testing completed
